'''New Ralltiir''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] on which [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] rested after the first defeat of the clone of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. While there, [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]] interviewed Han about his exploits in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] years before.<ref name="HSCS">''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-11-XX -->''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''
